business_ideas.idea: First Dibs: auction platform for first-limited-run items directly from creators and celebrities
Drone light show franchise; synchronized drone aerial displays replacing fireworks at events
Just Talking: subscription platform for seniors and boomers to connect and chat safely online
YC for Content: accelerator program funding pilot episodes and content creators like Y Combinator funds startups
Boy Scouts replacement without religion or sexual harassment issues; direct-to-consumer outdoor program
Org Charts: public Wikipedia-style directory of company organizational structures and decision-makers
Hemingway for Email: software tool to improve business writing and email clarity
TRT Subscription: direct-to-consumer testosterone replacement therapy recurring business
Clout Kitchens: cloud kitchens with influencer brands delivering through food delivery apps
Hooked for Romance Novels: short-form romance fiction subscription app like Hooked for young adult

predictions.text: Content platforms like Netflix and Disney+ will dominate; opportunities exist in niche content categories
